positive: Minimalist, stylized illustration of a roaring forest wolf silhouette against a vibrant, abstract celestial background. The wolf is leaping mid-pounce, capturing dynamic movement. The background features nebula swirls, cosmic dust gradients (deep sapphire, ethereal teal, and soft violet), and subtle constellations drawn with fine, white dot work. High contrast, clean vector lines, flat graphic design style, designed for apparel print. Composition is centered and strong. Cinematic lighting suggests starlight emanating from the background. --ar 1:1
negative: blurry, noisy, ugly, low resolution, watermark, text, logo, signature, dirty, muddy, cartoonish, oil paint, photo, grainy, poorly drawn hands, multiple heads, extra limbs, bad anatomy, out of frame
